prototype_prefill_shape_check.output_summary: All four ranks printed ok=True at iteration 9 for 512 token rows with three reused slots.

vllm_smokes.name: eager_ipc_liveness
vllm_smokes.evidence: Rank 0 logged MiniMax Q/K XPU IPC allreduce initialized (world_size=4, slots=128, max_tokens=1024).
vllm_smokes.interpretation: Correct liveness smoke only; eager mode is not a performance benchmark.

vllm_smokes.name: compiled_ipc_attempt
vllm_smokes.symptom: TorchDynamo rejected the disabled ensure_initialized function inside the compiled forward path.
vllm_smokes.interpretation: IPC mailbox setup must move outside the compiled region before this can be a real speed path.

vllm_smokes.name: compiled_flag_fallback_after_guard
vllm_smokes.interpretation: The guard now avoids a compiled-mode crash by falling back to oneCCL; this is not an IPC performance result.

decision: Keep VLLM_MINIMAX_QK_RMS_XPU_IPC unset for throughput benchmarks. Next work is graph-safe pre-initialization so the compiled forward path can call only the custom op with prebuilt pointer tensors and device counters.
